name: Stir-Fry Pork with Pea Pods (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Peanut oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all visible fat from the pork chops and slice the meat into thin strips, about 1/4-inch thick and 1/2 to 1-inch wide.
2. Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add the pork and brown, stirring often.
3. Mix together the black pepper, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, sesame seeds, and water. Add to the browned meat.
4. Add the onions. Cover, reduce heat, and let simmer for about 30 minutes until the pork is cooked through, stirring occasionally. Add more water if necessary to prevent sticking.
5. Meanwhile, cook the pea pods according to package directions without added salt.
6. Add the cooked pea pods to the pork, stir, and serve. Makes 4 servings.
